close_reason: Simplified .envrc to use generated turnkey-direnv-lib.sh (146 lines → 17 lines)
description: After implementing use_turnkey, update .envrc to: (1) use flake . --no-pure-eval, (2) source TURNKEY_DIRENV_LIB, (3) use turnkey. Remove all inline shell functions and regeneration logic.
title: Simplify .envrc to use turnkey directive
